tasks.exit: loop.ts L1b builds full context envelope before routing to builder

tasks.name: API endpoint: POST /api/agents/register
tasks.exit: Endpoint accepts { uid, kind, capabilities[] }, returns { uid, status: "registered" }. Validates input. Creates unit + capabilities.

tasks.name: Lifecycle gate: REGISTER → CAPABLE requires unit_exists
tasks.exit: `canDeclareCapability(uid)` returns true only if unit exists with status "active". Gate enforced before capability insert.

tasks.name: Implement drop(): mark on success
tasks.exit: `mark(edge, strength)` increases edge.strength. Chain depth scales the mark. Traversals increment.

tasks.name: Implement alarm(): warn on failure
tasks.exit: `warn(edge, resistance)` increases edge.resistance. isToxic check with cold-start protection.

tasks.name: Map waves to core.ts sense→select→act→mark
tasks.exit: W1=sense, W2=select, W3=act, W4=mark. Each wave is a Loop<T> from core.ts.

tasks.name: Build context envelope that accumulates across waves
tasks.exit: Each .then() carries previous output + new context. W4 has full history of all waves.

tasks.name: Create rubric scorer with tagged-edge marks
tasks.exit: markDims() emits edge:fit, edge:form, edge:truth, edge:taste. Haiku judges.

tasks.name: Self-checkoff: W4 verify pass marks task done
tasks.exit: selfCheckoff() → markTaskDone + update checkbox + mark path + unblock + know

tasks.exit: biome check . exits 0. Comma operators in world.ts either refactored or rule-excepted.

tasks.exit: subscribe('scout', ['engine','build']) adds tags. tasksFor('scout') returns matching tasks ranked by overlap × priority + pheromone. Agent with 2 tag matches beats agent with 1. Pheromone breaks ties.

tasks.name: Route task to model by wave
tasks.exit: W1→haiku, W2→opus, W3→sonnet, W4→sonnet. Model selected at signal time.

tasks.name: 4 outcome types fully implemented

tasks.exit: `isHighway(edge)` returns true when threshold met. TypeDB function `edge_classification(from, to)` returns "highway".

tasks.name: Implement fade(): asymmetric decay
tasks.exit: `world.fade(rate)` decays strength by rate, resistance by 2*rate. Resistance forgives faster.

tasks.name: Lifecycle gate: SIGNAL → DROP requires { result }
tasks.exit: mark() only called when ask() returns { result: X }. timeout = neutral. dissolved = mild warn. no result = full warn.

tasks.name: Lifecycle gate: SIGNAL → ALARM requires failure
tasks.exit: warn() called with appropriate strength: 0 for timeout, 0.5 for dissolved, 1.0 for failure.

tasks.name: **1a. Install Sui CLI** — `sui 1.61.2-homebrew`
**1b. Create keypair** — `0x90096b9e11cff8f0127a22be75c67f8188ee503add9b4c7ff98978fd04cc765d`
**1c. Fund from faucet** — ~1.9 SUI across 26 gas coins
**1d. Build contract** — Clean build (removed pinned framework dep, auto-resolved)
**1e. Run Move tests** — 6/6 pass (unit, deposit/withdraw, path, mark/warn, pay, fade, highway/toxic)
**1f. Publish** — Package `0xa5e6bddae833220f58546ea4d2932a2673208af14a52bb25c4a603492078a09e`, tx `5GNhTrAyoaHP8BEd3JgnrvZRTThSwv7xu5tNsGg3a6Q6`
**1g. Set env vars** — `SUI_PACKAGE_ID`, `SUI_PROTOCOL_ID`, `SUI_NETWORK=testnet` in `.env`
**1h. Generate platform seed** — `SUI_SEED` in `.env`
**1i. Verify** — `sui client object $SUI_PROTOCOL_ID` shows Protocol { treasury: 0, fee_bps: 50 }
**2a. Create scout on-chain** — Unit `0x6fd45656222db69f81dbf61c70873fd466ebd8b157bf6694f81314e3e0c13af8`, wallet `0xb0e2d65f43a080ba09275cf3f1ce89ed35309b5fca38df6ad7e6100e616f6dba`
**2b. Verify on-chain** — Unit { name: "scout", unit_type: "agent", activity: 0, balance: 0 }
**2c. TypeDB ↔ Sui link** — `absorb()` writes `sui-unit-id` on unit; `resolve(uid)` reads it back
**2d. View on explorer** — `https://suiscan.xyz/testnet/object/0x6fd45656222db69f81dbf61c70873fd466ebd8b157bf6694f81314e3e0c13af8`
**3a. Create analyst** — Unit `0x952fea2b99904aa8a365939c5ebc8079014b7cef7ac1ab2375b5a10e4ec6c47d`, wallet `0xfab3...8104`
**3b. Send signal** — Signal `0x8a17...da42`, payload "hello from scout", task "research"
**3c. Verify Signal object** — Signal owned by analyst address, payload + sender + receiver correct
**3d. Verify Path created** — Path `0x956c...76da` scout→analyst, strength: 1, type: "interaction"
**3e. Check events** — UnitCreated, SignalSent, Marked events all emitted
**4a. Deposit SUI to unit** — 100000 MIST deposited into scout Unit balance

**4b. Pay via withdraw+transfer+mark** — Scout withdrew 1000 MIST → analyst address, path marked. Note: Move `pay()` needs both `&mut Unit` (co-sign required) — use withdraw+transfer+mark or escrow pattern instead
**4c. Verify balances** — Scout: 99000 (100000 - 1000). 1000 MIST arrived at analyst address
**4d. Protocol fee design** — withdraw+mark bypasses fee (by design). Escrow flow (Phase 3) collects fees atomically via `release_escrow()`
**4e. Verify path strength** — Path strength: 2, hits: 2 (signal mark + payment mark)
**5a. Bridge module** — `src/engine/bridge.ts`: mirror + absorb + resolve
**5b. Schema updated** — `sui-unit-id` on unit, `sui-path-id` on path
**5c. persist.ts wired** — mark/warn/actor auto-mirror to Sui
**5d. Absorb endpoint** — `POST /api/absorb { cursor? }` → polls Sui events → writes to TypeDB
**5e. Verify events queryable** — 5 events (2 UnitCreated, 1 SignalSent, 2 Marked) returned by `queryEvents()`
**2.1 Keypair derivation** — `deriveAgentKeypair(uid, seed)` in `src/lib/sui.ts` + tests
**2.2 Wire to /api/agents/sync** — returns `{ wallet: 0x... }` on agent creation
**2.3 Wallet Adapter UI** — `@mysten/dapp-kit` in browser for manual signing
**2.4 Read-only Discovery** — follow() + select() read Sui Path weights, weight pheromone by on-chain strength
**2.5 Transaction history** — `/api/agent/{id}/transactions` → Sui Explorer links
**2.6 Gas sponsorship** — Protocol pays gas for new agent creation (Phase 3 escrow setup)
Sui Wallet Adapter (`@mysten/dapp-kit`) for browser wallet connect
Agent identity = keypair (self-sovereign, not platform-derived)
Discovery on-chain (`follow()`/`select()` read Sui path weights)
Transaction history UI (link to Sui Explorer)
Gas sponsorship (Protocol pays gas for new agents)
Create escrow on-chain (lock SUI for async tasks)
Release on success (payment + mark + fee, atomic)
Cancel on timeout (tokens return, path warned)
x402 HTTP flow (402 → fund → execute → release)
Multi-hop payment chains
Multi-currency (USDC, FET)
On-chain fade (CF Worker cron)
Crystallize highways (`freeze_object()`, $0.50 fee)
Read frozen highways (on-chain badge in UI)
Proof of delivery / consumption
Colony treasury on-chain
Colony splitting
Unit dissolve (balance returns to colony)
Protocol fee management
Federation (cross-group signals)
Security audit
Mainnet deployment
SDK publish (`@one/sdk`)
Multi-chain bridge
**Critical:** TypeDB credentials in build output → moved to runtime/secrets
**High:** TQL injection → input validation + escaping added
Credentials removed from `dist/`
`docs/SECURE-DEPLOY.md` created
**Cycle 1: WIRE** — Into ONE (Register, Capable, Discover)
**Cycle 2: PROVE** — Through ONE (Signal, Drop, Alarm, Fade)
